title: Health Canada Drug Product Database (DPD) data extract - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada Drug Product Database (DPD) data extract
The data extract is a series of compressed UTF-8 text files of the database. The uncompressed size of the files is approximately 117 MB. In order to utilize the data, the file must be loaded into an existing database or information system. The typical user is most likely a third party claims adjudicator, provincial formulary, insurance company, etc. For a casual user to use this file, they must be familiar with database structure and capable of setting up their own queries. The "Read me" file contains the data structure required to download the zipped files.
The DPD extract files contain complete product information for all approved (filename_ap.zip), marketed (filename.zip), cancelled (filename_ia.zip) and dormant (filename_dr.zip) products, for human, veterinary, disinfectant and radiopharmaceutical use.
Get more information about the DPD    data   extract  structure:
- About  the drug product database data extract structure
If you would like to receive communications regarding future changes to the DPD data extracts, please send an email to the following address to sign up for the mailing list: osip.sys-bppi@hc-sc.gc.ca .
New Files (UTF-8 format) Filename
QRYM_ACTIVE_INGREDIENTS
QRYM_INACTIVE_PRODUCTS
QRYM_PHARMACEUTICAL_STD
QRYM_THERAPEUTIC_CLASS
QRYM_VETERINARY_SPECIES
For information on copyright and who to contact, please visit the Drug Product Database Terms and Conditions .
